_comment: All non-permit signal-layer source endpoints / dataset ids (spec Appendix B + §4). Edit to add/disable a source without touching code. 'verify' = confirm live during Phase 0. The orchestrator (scripts/run-all-layers.js) reads the 'enabled' flag and 'agent' dir for each layer.

L1_permits.label: Building permits
L1_permits.note: Per-jurisdiction; OC via Playwright agents, LA/Nashville via Socrata.

L2_planning.label: Planning commission / Design Review agendas
L2_planning.note: Reuses BBC agents/drb multi-platform scraper + pdf-parse. Entitlement signal — design-team selection within 90-180 days.

L3_ceqa.label: CEQA / EIR environmental filings
L3_ceqa.verify: phase-0 — confirm whether CEQAnet exposes a JSON/CSV export or query API; otherwise HTML search harvest. NOP is the earliest signal (12-18mo).

L4_deeds.label: Land transfers / deeds
L4_deeds.note: Prefer ATTOM transaction/deed endpoints (key reused from BBC). Flag LLC/developer grantees on multifamily-zoned/sized parcels.

L5_hcd.label: CA HCD / density-bonus / streamlining
L5_hcd.verify: phase-0 — confirm current HCD APR / RHNA CKAN resource ids on data.ca.gov. Partly news-augmented at MVP.

L6_sb79.label: SB 79 / transit-corridor / ADU-batch triggers
L6_sb79.verify: phase-0 — confirm GTFS static feed URLs (transit agencies rotate them). MVP = overlay stops against harvested records and FLAG within SB 79 tiers, not full parcel scan (Phase-4 enhancement).

L7_news.label: Developer & national-builder news
L7_news.note: Reuses tech-leads news_fetch pattern (SerpAPI google_news). Crown-jewel repeat-developer queries seeded in Phase 0 (discovery item 2).

developerEntity.note: LLC grantee → real developer principal (spec §7, the one net-new enrichment problem)
